violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --- Small bowl used to refill salt. -Changed to a scoop with a handle

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items found in walk-in cooler not dated.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep cooler not holding below 41F
